hero.headline: 23 Years of Pools Done Right
hero.subheadline: Countryside Pool Services has been Loudoun County's trusted pool partner since 2003. From custom design-builds to weekly maintenance, Albert and Gina deliver the care your pool deserves.
checkmarks: Family-owned with 23+ years of hands-on experience
Authorized Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris & Pebble Tec partner
Serving all of Loudoun County and Northern Virginia

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs, <br class="hidden md:block">One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From brand-new builds to routine upkeep, we handle every aspect of pool ownership so you can simply enjoy the water.

cards.title: Custom Design & Build
cards.description: Dream it, we build it. Our design team creates stunning pools and spas tailored to your backyard, lifestyle, and budget — from concept sketches to the final splash.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Crystal-clear water every week. We handle chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, filter cleaning, and full equipment checks so you never worry about your pool.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, chlorinators, and automation systems — we diagnose fast and fix it right the first time using genuine parts from brands we trust.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Breathe new life into an aging pool. Resurfacing, tile upgrades, coping replacement, and full modernization to make your pool look and feel brand new.

cards.title: Opening & Closing Services
cards.description: Seasonal transitions handled with care. We prep your pool for summer fun and winterize it properly to protect your investment through the cold months.

cards.title: Water Feature Installation
cards.description: Elevate your backyard with waterfalls, bubblers, deck jets, and lighting. We design and install features that transform your pool into a personal resort.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Reach out by phone or email. We respond quickly — often within the hour — and schedule a visit at your convenience.

steps.title: On-Site Assessment
steps.description: Albert or a senior technician visits your property, evaluates your pool, and walks you through your options with honest, straightforward pricing.

steps.title: Sit Back and Enjoy
steps.description: We get to work on your timeline. Whether it is a new build or weekly service, you will see why Loudoun County families have trusted us for over two decades.

about.label: About Countryside Pool Services
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Trust Since 2003
about.description: When Albert and Gina founded Countryside Pool Services in 2003, they had one goal: treat every customer's pool like their own. Twenty-three years later, that philosophy has earned them back-to-back BOL Finalist recognition, PHTA membership, and the loyalty of families across Loudoun County. As authorized partners with Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris, and Pebble Tec, they bring premium-brand quality to every project — from a simple filter repair to a full custom build.

features.title: Family-Owned & Operated
features.description: Albert and Gina are personally involved in every project. You are never handed off to a faceless call center or random subcontractor.

features.title: Premium Brand Partnerships
features.description: Authorized partners with Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris, and Pebble Tec. We use and stand behind the best equipment in the industry.

features.title: Back-to-Back Award Recognition
features.description: Named BOL Finalist in both 2024 and 2025. Our neighbors trust us — and we work every day to earn that trust.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We believe in transparent quotes with no hidden fees. Every project gets a detailed breakdown before we start, and we never upsell services you do not need.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with our work, we will come back and make it right — no questions asked. With 23 years of reputation on the line, your satisfaction is not just a guarantee, it is our standard. We stand behind every service call, every repair, and every build.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced?
faqs.answer: We recommend weekly maintenance for most pools in Northern Virginia. Our full-service visits include chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks to keep your water safe and sparkling all season long.

faqs.question: Do you handle both pool construction and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. Countryside Pool Services is a true full-service company. We design and build custom pools, and we also provide ongoing weekly maintenance, seasonal openings and closings, and all repairs. Many clients start with a build and stay with us for years of maintenance.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Leesburg, Loudoun County, and surrounding communities in Northern Virginia. If you are unsure whether you are in our service area, give us a call and we will let you know right away.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an equipment emergency?
faqs.answer: We pride ourselves on fast response times. For urgent issues like pump failures or leaks, we often have a technician available within the same day. Call us directly at 703-779-5680 for emergencies.

faqs.question: What brands do you work with?
faqs.answer: We are authorized partners with Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris, and Pebble Tec. These industry-leading brands allow us to provide top-quality equipment, parts, and finishes for every project.

testimonials.name: Brandy Drew
testimonials.text: Excellent service!! Owners Albert and Gina are amazing! Very strong knowledge in the pool industry and always willing to go the extra mile for customer happiness. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Darcy Weyant
testimonials.text: Our pool is officially complete and the process was seamless. I can 100% say I trust Countryside Pool Services.

testimonials.name: Tracey Savage
testimonials.text: Hands down the best Pool Company out there. Honest, reliable, and exceptionally priced.

contact.headline: Ready for a Pool You Can Be Proud Of?
contact.subtitle: Whether you need a new build, a renovation, or reliable weekly service, we are here to help. Reach out today and see why Loudoun County trusts Countryside.
benefits: 23+ years of local expertise at your service
